subtitles.original: また淡々と取り繕っている
subtitles.english: Still indifferently keeping up appearances,

subtitles.original: 本当の顔は誰のためで
subtitles.english: for whose sake is my real face?

subtitles.original: ただ苦しくなるね
subtitles.english: It just becomes painful, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: お揃いの名前の前 前の前
subtitles.english: Before our matching names...

subtitles.original: ただ泣いてないで 笑っていたいよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to just cry, I want to be laughing.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつまでも Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, forever a Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: 愛なんてわかっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't understand things like love at all.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつの日か Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, someday a Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: 脱いでみたい
subtitles.english: I want to take it off.

subtitles.original: 演技でもないなら
subtitles.english: If it's not even an act, then...

subtitles.original: それだって勝手 よせなはれ
subtitles.english: That's also selfish, so cut it out.

subtitles.original: 胸に秘めている Deep Faker
subtitles.english: The Deep Faker hidden in my heart.

subtitles.original: また泣いたように笑っていたんだ
subtitles.english: Again, I laughed as if I were crying.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me 偽りの Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, the false Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: 愛なんてわかっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't understand things like love at all.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつの間にか Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, before I knew it, a Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me, All eyes on me, Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, All eyes on me, Deep Faker

subtitles.original: All eyes on me, Deep... Deep... Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, Deep... Deep... Deep Faker

subtitles.original: All eyes on me, All eyes on me, Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, All eyes on me, Deep Faker

subtitles.original: All eyes on me, Deep... Deep... Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, Deep... Deep... Deep Faker

subtitles.original: みんな、どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: Everyone, how was it?

subtitles.original: いやぁ、今回はですね、あの
subtitles.english: Well, this time, you see...

subtitles.original: ハウスダンスにね、初めて挑戦したんですけれども
subtitles.english: I tried house dancing for the very first time,

subtitles.original: あの、2ヶ月で、あの、詰め込んで、踊れてましたか？
subtitles.english: and had to cram it all in 2 months. Did I manage to dance it?

subtitles.original: いや、めっちゃ頑張ったってコメントが書いてくれてるんだろうなぁ、いやはや
subtitles.english: I'm sure the comments are saying, "You worked so hard!" Gosh...

subtitles.original: でね、あの、「波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること」って曲では
subtitles.english: And also, in the song "Naming the waves, our breathing having an end,"

subtitles.original: リフトをしたり、あの、クルクルね、回って
subtitles.english: doing lifts and spinning around...

subtitles.original: あれも初めてやりました。踊れてたら嬉しいね！
subtitles.english: I did that for the first time too. I hope I danced it well!

subtitles.original: いや、ゲストのね、ハル先輩、レイドちゃんともイケイケに踊って
subtitles.english: And I danced so coolly with the guests, Haru-senpai and Reid-chan!

subtitles.original: つるぎ先輩とは、憧れのつるぎ先輩と2人きりでドキドキタイムしちゃったり
subtitles.english: With Tsurugi-senpai, the Tsurugi-senpai I admire, we had a heart-pounding time alone together!

subtitles.original: るな氏とゆい先輩となずちゃんとは、もう対決しまくって
subtitles.english: I faced off like crazy against Runa-shi, Yui-senpai, and Nazu-chan,

subtitles.original: るぜせんとべにちゃんとは歌って
subtitles.english: sang with Ruze-sen and Beni-chan,

subtitles.original: フォルテとはカッコよく、いやぁ
subtitles.english: and with Forte, it was so cool. Man...

subtitles.original: ゲストパートもたくさんね、素晴らしいのがあったんじゃないでしょうか？
subtitles.english: We had so many wonderful guest parts, didn't we?

subtitles.original: ということで、皆さん、何か忘れてませんか？
subtitles.english: So, everyone, aren't you forgetting something?

subtitles.original: ねぇ、皆さん。枢の休憩タイムもね、もうそろそろ終わらないといけない。
subtitles.english: Right, everyone? Su's break time has to end pretty soon.

subtitles.original: よし、立つか。うわぁ、はい。
subtitles.english: Alright, let's stand up. Whoa, okay.

subtitles.original: ということで、なんとですね、こんな感じで言うのもなんですが、
subtitles.english: So, actually, it's a bit sudden to say it like this, but...

subtitles.original: 新曲が出ます！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: A new song is coming out! Yay!

subtitles.original: 初のオリジナル楽曲！フフフフフ！
subtitles.english: My very first original song! Uhuhu!

subtitles.original: あ、やばい、体が疲れた。よいしょ、よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Ah, oh no, my body is tired. Heave-ho, heave-ho.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、作詞・作曲・編曲は、サトダユーリさんに作ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, the lyrics, composition, and arrangement were done by Satoda Yuri-san!

subtitles.original: ありがと、ドンドパフパフ ドンドパフパフ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Dondopafupafu dondopafupafu!

subtitles.original: はい、このあと、すぐMV公開がね、この配信が終わったあとあるのですが、
subtitles.english: Yes, right after this stream ends, the MV will be released!

subtitles.original: リダイレクトで飛びます。そして、デジタルリリースは、今日の0時からなので、
subtitles.english: We will redirect you there. And the digital release starts at midnight tonight,

subtitles.original: たくさん聴いてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so I'd be happy if you listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ちょっと早速なんですけど、その新曲をお披露目しちゃおうかな？
subtitles.english: Now, without further ado, shall I perform the new song?

subtitles.original: いや、どんな楽曲なんだろう？気になるな。どんな楽曲なんだろう？行きます！
subtitles.english: I wonder what kind of song it is. I'm so curious. What kind of song could it be? Here we go!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ
subtitles.english: Umya-umya, umya-umya!

subtitles.original: うにゃうにゃ うにゃうにゃ
subtitles.english: Unya-unya, unya-unya!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ うにゃうにゃ
subtitles.english: Umya-umya, unya-unya!

subtitles.original: どろろん？ きゅるるんっ
subtitles.english: Dororon? Kyururun!

subtitles.original: あ～そろそろごはんの時間かな？
subtitles.english: Ah, is it about time for dinner?

subtitles.original: あ、でもでも、やっぱやっぱ 家から一歩も出たくな～いっ!!
subtitles.english: But then again, after all, I don't wanna take a single step outside!!

subtitles.original: こんな時はそうだ！ 飯テロの動画！
subtitles.english: In times like this, yes! A food-porn video!

subtitles.original: 「説明しよう！極限までお腹を空かし美味しくいただくのだ！」
subtitles.english: "Let me explain! You starve yourself to the limit, then eat deliciously!"

subtitles.original: めんどいめんどいマジめんどいわ
subtitles.english: So annoying, so annoying, seriously annoying!

subtitles.original: けっきょくぐだぐだ時間溶けたわ
subtitles.english: In the end, I just wasted time slacking off.

subtitles.original: ぴろんぴろん5回目アラーム
subtitles.english: Beep, beep, that's the fifth alarm!

subtitles.original: コンビニいこー
subtitles.english: Let's go to the convenience store!

subtitles.original: わちゃわちゃはちゃめちゃ奇想天外
subtitles.english: Noisy, crazy, and unpredictable!

subtitles.original: ドタバタてんやわんや見逃せない
subtitles.english: An uproar, a hectic mess, you can't miss it!

subtitles.original: ピンチだってちょいのちょいのちょいで
subtitles.english: Even a pinch is solved in a jiffy!

subtitles.original: てやっ！ てやっ！ そりゃっ！ そりゃっ！ 万事解決☆
subtitles.english: Teyah! Teyah! Soryah! Soryah! All is resolved☆

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃうにゃうにゃ おいしくなぁれ☆
subtitles.english: Umya-umya, unya-unya, become delicious☆

subtitles.original: あれもこれもお皿全部食べたいな
subtitles.english: I want to eat this, that, and the whole plate!

subtitles.original: ぱくぱくうみゃうみゃハピネスライフ
subtitles.english: Chomp chomp, umya-umya, happy life!

subtitles.original: 食べて寝て遊んでまた食べる
subtitles.english: Eat, sleep, play, and eat again!

subtitles.original: ぺこぺこぺこぺこはらぺこじゃ
subtitles.english: Total, total empty stomach!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃうみゃうまく生きません
subtitles.english: Umya-umya, life doesn't go smoothly!

subtitles.original: ひとまずごはんをおなか1ぱい食べさせてよ
subtitles.english: For now, let me eat my fill of food!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ
subtitles.english: Umya-umya!

subtitles.original: うにゃうにゃ？
subtitles.english: Unya-unya?

subtitles.original: うみゃうにゃ！
subtitles.english: Umya-unya!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation for Mizumiya Su Segment (00:00 - 05:00)**

Okay, here's what I've got for this video segment. My main task is to create accurate, well-timed subtitles, but I'm going to document all my steps and thought processes for a fulsome summary.

First, the goal is to get subtitles for Mizumiya Su. I need to make sure the timecodes are perfect and the transcription is 100% correct.

The initial segment, from 00:00 to 01:15, seems to be a song. The first task is to identify the song. I've listened, transcribed, and identified it as "Deep Faker". Now, the important step is to be sure to get the correct lyrics for "Deep Faker". I listened carefully.

I am checking who wrote "Deep Faker". I am using search terms to get the lyrics. I confirmed the lyrics.

I will start transcribing, timing, and translating the Japanese lyrics. The critical part is keeping the English text clear and under 50 characters, while also capturing the intended meaning. I also need to make sure I am doing it in the correct tense.

At 01:00, I've got a breakdown section. I'll need to accurately time and transcribe that. It sounds like she's chanting "All eyes on me, Deep Faker" repeatedly.

From 01:14 to 01:25, there's silence, a bit of applause, and what sounds like some background noise. I'll just skip that section, and there are no subtitles needed here.

At 01:25, Mizumiya Su starts speaking. I'm noting the content, but for the subtitles, I'm focusing on timing and accuracy. I'm focusing on the words themselves and their meaning. I am also making sure I am consistent, and using "en" (English) for the English translations and "og" for the original language text.

She's talking about a live performance. Now, I need to know the context, the names of the guests she's mentioning, and the songs. This part is tricky because it's important to get these names right for accuracy. The question is, are these Hololive talents, or Neo-Porte, or others? She has mentioned "ハコ先輩", "ハジちゃん", "スバル先輩", etc. I need to make sure I get these names right and correctly identify them in the subtitles.

I'm making sure I can identify each of the guests, because I know that it is important to be accurate. I am making use of search terms. Then I check on the dates, and determine the guests.

I'm confirming who is "ハコ先輩" (Hako-senpai) by cross-referencing with live information to determine the guests of the show.

I am re-listening for greater accuracy with a Neo-Porte context in mind. I keep re-checking, making sure to get every single one correct. She is mentioning several names, and I am careful to get these names correctly.

I determine that "ハル先輩" (Haru-senpai) is Shibuya Hal, and "レイドちゃん" (Reido-chan) is Shirayuki Reid. And "つるぎ先輩" (Tsurugi-senpai) is Hiiragi Tsurugi.

I've also got "るな氏" (Runa-shi) for Shinomiya Run, and "ゆい先輩" (Yui-senpai) for Hizuki Yui, and "なずちゃん" (Nazu-chan) for Kaga Nazuna, and "るぜせんと" (Ruze-sen) for Aruse Inu and "べにちゃん" (Beni-chan) for Yakumo Beni, and "フォルテ" (Forute) for Tentei Forte.

The conversation involves Neo-Porte members and the guests are Neo-Porte members as well. I'm carefully transcribing, and making sure the information is correct and the subtitles are accurate. I am very confident of this. I made sure to be incredibly careful.

She announces a new original song! I'm transcribing all of this.

Then, there is her new song "うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ" (Umya Unya Happy Life). I need to transcribe the lyrics and also sync them with the audio. I am very confident that I have the correct lyrics.

I will carefully time the lyrics, making sure I am consistent. I make use of the lyrics I have, and will sync them. I will also make sure to use all the constraints. I will be sure to get the screen text.

I now need to pay
